List.Title: Automation Requests
List.Description: Backend for bulk uploads and automated tasks. This list is used to trigger, track, and notify users of different automations. For system use only. Important: Do not add items to this list directly. Doing so may break things and corrupt data. Only use via the Bulk Uploads and Automations section.
List.Name: {195639D2-F676-4AF3-904C-023C9F39E43E}

Field.Name: Title
Field.Description: The title of this submission. This value is auto-generated after submitting the automation request form.

Field.CustomFormatter: {"elmType":"div","style":{"flex-wrap":"wrap","display":"flex"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","style":{"box-sizing":"border-box","padding":"4px 8px 5px Field.Description: Select the type of automation you would like to run.
Field.Name: AutomationType
Field.Title: Automation Type

CHOICES.CHOICE: Add People in bulk by copying and pasting UniqNames
Add or update People in bulk using a spreadsheet
Assign a Primary Investigator to multiple people
Update multiple People using MCommunity and Office 365
Add event registrants to existing event
Add event attendees to existing event
Add event speakers to existing event
Add event summaries in bulk using a spreadsheet
Sync Group members for a specific group

Field.Name: Status
Field.Description: The current status of this automation request. Do not edit manually.

Field.Name: PI
Field.Title: PI
Field.Description: The Primary Investigator to use in this automation, if applicable.

Field.Name: Event
Field.Title: Event
Field.Description: The Event Summary to use in this automation, if applicable.
Select a group.
Field.Name: Group
Field.Title: Group

Field.Description: For events and services only: when checked, existing participants are overridden (recipients, attendees, registrants, etc., depending on the automation selected).
Field.Name: OverrideParticipants
Field.Title: Override Participants

Field.Description: Enter a list of UniqNames or e-mail addresses separated by commas, or one per line.
Field.Name: UserList
Field.Title: List of Users

Field.CustomFormatter: {"elmType":"div","style":{"flex-wrap":"wrap","display":"flex"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","style":{"box-sizing":"border-box","padding":"4px 8px 5px Field.Description: If a contact is not already in the People list, it will be created automatically using this contact type as needed.
Field.Name: ContactType
Field.Title: Contact Type

Field.Name: Template
Field.Title: Template
Field.Description: Paste your document or email here to use as a template. Available fields: [FIRSTNAME], [LASTNAME], [FULLNAME], [PI], [CENTERNAME].

Field.Name: SubmissionForm
Field.Description: The custom form that was submitted. This field is based on Confirmation checkboxes, and is used to determine what flow to run.

Field.Name: ConfirmPeopleUpload
Field.Title: ConfirmPeopleUpload
Field.Description: Checkbox used to identify that a specific automation is being selected, without actually selecting it from the drop-down. This is needed for automations that are linked to from within the navigation menu.

Field.Name: ConfirmPIAssignment
Field.Title: ConfirmPIAssignment
Field.Description: Checkbox used to identify that a specific automation is being selected, without actually selecting it from the drop-down. This is needed for automations that are linked to from within the navigation menu.

Field.Name: ConfirmEventAttendanceUpload
Field.Title: ConfirmEventAttendanceUpload
Field.Description: Checkbox used to identify that a specific automation is being selected, without actually selecting it from the drop-down. This is needed for automations that are linked to from within the navigation menu.

Field.Name: ConfirmEventRegistrationUpload
Field.Title: ConfirmEventRegistrationUpload
Field.Description: Checkbox used to identify that a specific automation is being selected, without actually selecting it from the drop-down. This is needed for automations that are linked to from within the navigation menu.
The name of the flow used.
Field.Name: Flow
Field.Title: Flow Name

Field.Description: Link to the log of this flow in the automation system (e.g. PowerAutomate or iPaaS).
Field.Name: FlowInstanceLink
Flow_x003a_Flow_x0020_ID
Field.Description: The internal ID of this automation.

Field.Name: Flow_x003a_Flow_x0020_Environmen
Field.Description: The hosting environment or server instance used for running this automation.

Field.Name: Group_x003a_MCommunity_x0020_Gro
Field.Description: The MCommunity group e-mail address associated with the Group that was selected for this automation.
